description: Launched a specialized development studio building high-performance SaaS products, IoT telemetry web panels, and custom AI agents.
Architected and delivered Zyox (catering logistics and interactive chef planners) and iSportzz (gamified community social network matching tournament brackets).
Integrated vector search databases and customized LLM prompts for automated document parsing and agentic customer support workflows.
Directed development of the Montra Connect smart rickshaw telemetry dashboard, connecting fleet managers with real-time operations data.
Implemented low-latency WebSockets streams handling telemetry updates from 1,000+ active EV vehicles.
Built cross-platform mobile fleet monitoring app using React Native, maps integration, and smooth vector graphics.
Engineered the core backend infrastructure for the iSportzz sports community social media network platform.
Designed scalable GraphQL APIs serving dynamic match matching, user profile networks, and selfie verification systems.
Reduced database lookup query times by 40% using Redis query caching and index optimization.
Developed clean, responsive landing pages and interactive client dashboards using React, CSS variables, and HTML5.
Integrated RESTful APIs and set up multi-factor OAuth security portals.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers to translate Figma visual interfaces into pixel-perfect modular React components.
